functional.description: Implement Redis-based caching for dashboard queries and real-time data.
Implement cache invalidation logic ensuring updates propagate within 5s.
Implement graceful degradation if Redis is unavailable.
Document and make cache TTL strategy configurable.

nonFunctional.description: Dashboard p95 latency must be < 200ms with caching.
Cache hit rate must be > 70% under typical load.

assumptions.description: A Redis instance is available or can be easily provisioned in the deployment environment.

domainModel.description: Stored version of a query result in Redis.

interactions.description: Request -> Check Redis -> (Hit: Return) | (Miss: Query DB -> Set Redis -> Return).

edgeCases.handling: Log warning and bypass cache, querying database directly.
Implement mutex (setnx) or short background revalidation.

terminology.definition: Time To Live - duration for which a cache entry is valid.
